name: Iris Ohyama 2-Burner IH Cooktop Portable
pros: No installation required—plug-and-play solution for rental apartments
Two independent burners with adjustable heat levels for flexible cooking
Easy-clean flat surface with built-in feet prevents scratching tatami floors
cons: Only 85 reviews indicate limited real-world feedback for reliability
IH cookware requirement may force additional purchases for newcomers
shortDescription: Portable 2-burner IH cooktop ideal for temporary housing or small kitchens.
review: This portable IH cooktop solves the rental apartment cooking problem—no landlord approval needed. Two burners work independently, and setup takes minutes. Good for expats in dorms or short-term housing. Limited reviews are a concern; verify IH cookware compatibility before buying. At ¥11,970, reasonable for the flexibility it offers.
